# KPI Contract — Board retention  [Define]
_Locked 2026-05-12, v1.0. Status: **RECONCILED** to Finance GL (closed 2026-05-28 — see `decisions.md`)._

## Net Revenue Retention (NRR) — headline
- **Definition:** for the cohort of paying accounts active at the start of the window, the share of
  starting MRR retained at the end including expansion, contraction, and churn; excludes new logos.
- **Formula:** (start MRR + expansion − contraction − churned MRR) / start MRR. Trailing 12-month.
- **Source of record:** billing MRR. Reconciled to Finance GL recognized revenue within tolerance (±0.5%).
- **Trials & free:** excluded. **Period basis:** fiscal, US/Pacific.

## Q2 FY26 value (reconciled)
NRR = **108% TTM** ending Q2 FY26. Tie-out to Finance GL: **0.3%** (within the ±0.5% tolerance).
Evidence: `nrr-reconciliation.md`.
